center.name: Paluma Range National Park
center.summary: Paluma Range National Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Fernwren、Large-billed scrubwren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fernwren is found in northeast Queensland rainforest between above sea-level, although more often above . It is found in the Paluma Range, near Townsville, and from the Tully Gorge National Park northwards to Cape Tribulation. It is sedentary and classified as endangered on the IUCN Red List

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: viridior is found in northeast Queensland from Mt Amos, south of Cooktown, to the Paluma Range National Park, near Townsville; and S
